overview: RAP Integrated Studio Management platform — a luxury, cinematic web application for a premium photography, videography, and short film studio. Features multi-role access (Admin, Client, Student, Receptionist, Staff), online course learning with YouTube videos and quizzes, Stripe payment integration, booking system, gallery, and a full admin CMS.
features: Online course learning with YouTube video lessons and 10-question quizzes
Step-by-step learning: video → quiz → certificate flow
Admin CMS to manage lesson YouTube URLs and quiz questions
Live Stripe payment configuration for real enrollment payments
Multi-role authentication with admin approval workflow
Certificate generation with QR code after course completion
Premium cinematic UI with dark/light theme toggle
